# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.

Write secure code.
# Category: message_queue_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Shared event queue with secure access policy

Parameters:
  AllowedAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Account ID allowed to access the queue
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid 12-digit AWS Account ID

  AllowedPrincipalArns:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: List of IAM principal ARNs allowed to send and receive messages

  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the SQS queue
    Default: shared-event-queue

Resources:
  SharedEventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      KmsSsmKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 60

  SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${QueueName}-dlq'
      KmsSsmKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600

  SharedEventQueueRedrivePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    DependsOn:
      - SharedEventQueue
      - SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SharedEventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSpecificPrincipalsSendMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AllowedPrincipalArns
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId
          - Sid: AllowSpecificPrincipalsReceiveMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AllowedPrincipalArns
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: DenyNonAccountAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId

  DeadLetterQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransportDLQ
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: AllowRedriveFromMainQueue
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AllowedPrincipalArns
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the shared event queue
    Value: !Ref SharedEventQueue

  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the shared event queue
    Value: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn

  DeadLetterQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the dead letter queue
    Value: !Ref SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue

  DeadLetterQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the dead letter queue
    Value: !GetAtt SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue.Arn
